markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client reporting strategies and address specific account issues.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tavern:** Focus reporting on Looker's "Overall Sessions" (YTD) and GSC's click growth. Defer Scrunch reporting until there's meaningful data, and align all reporting tools with Tavern's feature-led content clusters for clear performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [**InnoWell:** The 2 articles/month cadence is insufficient. Matthew will assess capacity to increase volume (target: 10/week) to meet the client's growth expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [**Goodwill:** Recommend pausing the low-converting glossary to shift resources to high-converting tool pages. This pivot aligns with the client's conversion goals and enables a more scalable programmatic strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)

## Topics

### Tavern: Reporting Strategy for New Clients

  - [**Looker:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [**Focus:** "Overall Sessions" (purple bar), viewed YTD to show long-term trend.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [**Rationale:** "Engaged Sessions" is ambiguous; YTD view provides context for early spikes.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Finding:** Tavern's early traffic (200 clicks in 7 weeks) is exceptionally strong.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**GSC:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Focus:** Clicks and impression growth.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Impression data is less reliable post-Sept 15th update, but early impression growth is a key indicator of future traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Finding:** Strong branded search growth suggests effective external marketing (e.g., influencers, paid ads).](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Scrunch:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Defer reporting until there's meaningful data to avoid setting false expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**Action:** Align Scrunch prompts with Tavern's feature-led content clusters (e.g., "retrieval," "demand").](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This creates a direct link between content strategy and LLM performance, enabling clear diagnosis of what's working.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Reporting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Early Stage:** Weekly check-ins to build momentum with small wins (e.g., SERP features).](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Mature Stage (Months 3-4):** Shift to monthly deep-dive reports.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This timing aligns with when performance data becomes stable enough to identify underperforming content and inform strategy pivots.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### InnoWell: Performance & Cadence

  - [**Redirect Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current Looker setup obscures the impact of recent redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Solution:** Create a Looker dashboard that cohorts traffic by URL type:](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
          - [Old Interwell URLs](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
          - [Old Growthx URLs](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
          - [New Growthx URLs](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This dashboard will prove that traffic successfully migrated to the new URLs and is now stabilizing/growing.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Awaiting access from Akina to execute the final batch of redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current 2 articles/month cadence is insufficient to meet growth expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [**Finding:** Programmatic content creation is highly scalable (e.g., 2 articles in 45 mins).](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew will assess capacity to increase the cadence, targeting 10 articles/week by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### Goodwill: Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** The glossary content is low-converting and being cannibalized by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Tool pages are high-converting and offer a scalable programmatic strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [**Recommendation:** Pause glossary production and reallocate resources to tool pages.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This pivot directly supports the client's conversion goals and enables a more efficient content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
      - [Ask Jason Gong about a Scrunch SOP.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [Nudge Akina for InnoWell redirect access.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
      - [Assess capacity to increase InnoWell's cadence to 10 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [Add Goodwill strategy pivot to tomorrow's agenda.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
      - [Send Matthew recommendations for tomorrow's agenda.](https://fathom.video/share/nm6UV5cWty7QLkyUoHLrsY4A8P6Wza6Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
